scannedText:
Subject: Urgent Password Reset Required - [Company Name] Security Update

Dear [User's First Name],

We hope this message finds you well.

This is the IT Support team at [Company Name]. As part of our ongoing commitment to maintaining the security and integrity of your account, we are reaching out to remind you that a password reset is required for your account. This action helps ensure that only you have access to your personal information and work-related data.

**Why is this necessary?**
